headline: Equinix Expands European Footprint As Funding And Credit Story Evolve
summary: Equinix, NasdaqGS:EQIX, agreed to acquire atNorth alongside CPP Investments to expand its European data center footprint and support sustainable digital infrastructure. The company completed a $1.5b senior notes issuance, adding capital for future development and refinancing needs. Moody's upgraded Equinix's credit rating, citing a stronger credit profile and role in global digital infrastructure. For investors watching Equinix at a share price of $953.0, these moves follow multi year share...
